name: SASTbench
description: Benchmark for evaluating SAST tools on agentic and general-purpose codebases

releaseBar.note: v1.0.0 requires Full Track with at least 3 real_world_disclosed cases

core.description: Self-contained vendored cases. No external repos required.

full.description: Core Track plus pinned snapshots from real public repositories.

profiles.agentic: Cases representing agentic code (default for legacy cases).
profiles.generic: Non-agentic real-world cases drawn from general-purpose open source.
profiles.all: Both profiles in a single run.
